2026-06-09.name: Salsa Bocadero
2026-06-09.description: Dj Pepe presents i.s.m GAZON ANTWERPEN Vanaf dinsdag 9 juni, elke dinsdag t/m dinsdag 25 augustus met SALSA BOCADERO + (S.B.K.M) GAZON A'PEN DANSEN AAN DE SCHELDE! 15th special summer edition 2026
2026-06-09.why: Iconic 15th summer edition of this legendary outdoor salsa series at the Scheldt river. DJ Pepe is a well-known figure in the Antwerp Latin scene. Weekly recurring event with strong community following and waterfront prestige.

2026-06-10.name: Salsa avond Zomerbar Lier
2026-06-10.description: Zin in een zwoele zomeravond vol Latin vibes? Geniet van een open Salsa-avond waar Salsa, Bachata en Kizomba elkaar moeiteloos afwisselen op de dansvloer
2026-06-10.why: Free outdoor summer event organized by the city of Lier with two known DJs (El Pablo & Carpentero). Municipal backing gives it strong local visibility and reliable organization. Great summer vibe.

2026-06-11.name: Salsa @ the Beach
2026-06-11.description: Elke donderdagavond van de zomer transformeert de Ark van Noë in Kasterlee tot jouw ultieme Latin Beach Paradise! Lekker chillen met vrienden op het mooiste strand van Vlaanderen
2026-06-11.why: Unique beach location concept, weekly recurring summer event. Free entry and relaxed atmosphere at 'the most beautiful beach in Flanders'. Strong local following for this Latin Beach Paradise series.

2026-06-12.name: Makutano Friday Party
2026-06-12.description: The place where all dance afficionados meet' is back one Friday per month! A meeting point for all dancers with the best DJs around. AREA 1: SALSA/MAMBO 90%, BACHATA 10%
2026-06-12.why: Highly reputable monthly social known as 'the place where all dance aficionados meet'. Multi-room setup with 90% salsa/mambo focus. Strong DJ lineup and established community following in the Brussels region.

2026-06-12.name: Pura Cuba | Pura Dominican Bachata gala
2026-06-12.description: PURA CUBA MEGA GALA — Cuban Salsa & Bachata Dominicana Weekend. Het festival van Cubaanse Salsa & Dominicaanse Bachata komt naar Brussel voor een weekend vol 100% social dance en Caribische vibes.
2026-06-12.why: Weekend festival dedicated to Cuban Salsa with strong Caribbean authenticity. QuieroBailar is a respected organizer in the Brussels Latin scene. Free entry for a full festival weekend experience.

2026-06-13.name: Cuban Salsa Leuven Open Air
2026-06-13.description: 🇨🇺 Cuban Salsa Leuven Open Air @ Martelarenplein! 100% Free event: free party & free workshops! 1st Edition of the summer series.
2026-06-13.why: Major open-air Cuban salsa event at iconic Martelarenplein in Leuven. First edition of summer series with free workshops and party. Long duration (14:00-23:30), prestigious central location, strong Leuven Salsa community backing.

2026-06-13.name: SBK Grand Social
2026-06-13.description: SKB Grand Social night @ Aerobicland. A Grand Social night in 2 rooms with international DJs and teachers for top vibes! Room 1 = Salsa & Bachata with DJ El Cantante 🇫🇷
2026-06-13.why: Multi-room grand social with international DJ (El Cantante from France). Strong production value with dedicated Salsa & Bachata room. Aerobicland is an established venue in the Bruges region.

2026-06-14.name: 10 Years of Emoción: open air
2026-06-14.description: Join us for 10 Years of Emoción — a series of three open-air dance events in front of the train station of Leuven! Expect open-level workshops, social dancing with DJ, summer vibes.
2026-06-14.why: Special 10th anniversary celebration of Emoción dance school. Prestigious open-air location at Martelarenplein. Anniversary editions carry extra community significance and typically attract larger crowds.

2026-06-14.name: Sabakiz Garden Matinee
2026-06-14.description: SABAKIZ GARDEN matinee - The Ultimate Outdoor SBK Social. Het is een begrip in de regio! Welkom bij SabaKiz Garden, dé ultieme zomermiddag voor alle Salsa dancers.
2026-06-14.why: Renowned outdoor SBK social described as 'een begrip in de regio' (a concept in the region). Ritmo Sabroso has strong community presence. Free garden matinee format perfect for summer social dancing.
